documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 dogfood feature-delivery plan stage. The tech-lead emitted the canonical plan-stage trio (plan.md, adr-draft.md, touch-set.json), declared the per-feature contracts: block in the feature index (timestamp-naming.policy-descriptor, timestamp-naming.migration-precedence, timestamp-naming.reference-update-audit), seeded the contracts directory, and refreshed the index for coder/implement handoff. Plan resolves the deferred migration timestamp-source precedence as git commit timestamp → frontmatter created_at → filesystem mtime → operator override, with replayability rationale.

deferred_items.rationale: feature-delivery implement stage runs after plan; coder dispatch is the next step under the touch-set declared at work/timestamp-naming-conventions/touch-set.json.
ADR 0005 lands as Proposed in work/; promotion to memory/adr/0005-timestamp-naming-conventions.md is part of the implement stage's documentation-impact obligations.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice delegates the plan stage to the named tech-lead persona per §4 and stops cleanly at the plan-to-implement boundary; checkpoints persist via the work-folder artifacts.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps every emitted artifact dual-anchored, encodes the convention as policy before mutating any in-scope path, and orders migration timestamp sources for replayability.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies the Phase 4 plan-stage requirement (plan.md + adr-draft.md + touch-set.json + per-feature contract: block) without expanding scope past the declared touch set.
